headline: RBC Capital Upgrades Unilever (UL) to Sector Perform
summary: Unilever PLC (NYSE:UL) is one of the 8 Best Counter Cyclical Stocks to Buy Right Now. On April 21, 2026, RBC Capital analyst James Edwardes Jones upgraded Unilever PLC (NYSE:UL) to Sector Perform from Underperform with an unchanged price target of 4,200 GBp. James Edwardes Jones said concerns around the disposal of the company’s food […]

headline: Assessing McCormick (NYSE:MKC) Valuation After Prolonged Share Price Weakness
summary: Why McCormick (MKC) Is On Investors’ Radar Today McCormick (MKC) is drawing attention after a prolonged share price slide, with the stock around US$51.47 and negative returns over the past month, past 3 months, year to date, and past year. See our latest analysis for McCormick. At around US$51.47, McCormick’s recent 7-day share price return of a 3.51% decline and year-to-date share price return of a 23.50% decline point to fading momentum, aligning with a 30.85% decline in 1-year total...
